name: Dell Technologies / 戴尔科技
sector: Enterprise hardware and AI infrastructure / 企业硬件与 AI 基础设施
summary: 戴尔科技销售服务器、存储、PC 和服务，其 AI 服务器产品组合与 NVIDIA GPU/网络平台绑定度较高，是 NVIDIA 企业 AI 落地的重要 OEM 之一。 / Dell sells servers, storage, PCs, and services. Its AI server portfolio is closely tied to NVIDIA GPU and networking platforms, making Dell an important enterprise AI OEM.
summaryZh: 戴尔科技销售服务器、存储、PC 和服务，其 AI 服务器产品组合与 NVIDIA GPU/网络平台绑定度较高，是 NVIDIA 企业 AI 落地的重要 OEM 之一。
summaryEn: Dell sells servers, storage, PCs, and services. Its AI server portfolio is closely tied to NVIDIA GPU and networking platforms, making Dell an important enterprise AI OEM.

business.description: 公司提供基础设施解决方案、客户端设备、软件和服务，覆盖企业数据中心、边缘和终端设备。 / The company provides infrastructure solutions, client devices, software, and services across enterprise data centers, edge, and endpoints.
business.descriptionZh: 公司提供基础设施解决方案、客户端设备、软件和服务，覆盖企业数据中心、边缘和终端设备。
business.descriptionEn: The company provides infrastructure solutions, client devices, software, and services across enterprise data centers, edge, and endpoints.
revenueModel: 基础设施解决方案 / infrastructure solutions
客户端解决方案 / client solutions
服务与软件 / services and software

business.thesis: NVIDIA 相关性来自 AI 服务器出货和企业 AI 项目，GPU 供应、订单积压和毛利率是核心变量。 / The NVIDIA linkage comes from AI server shipments and enterprise AI projects, with GPU supply, backlog, and margin as core variables.
business.thesisZh: NVIDIA 相关性来自 AI 服务器出货和企业 AI 项目，GPU 供应、订单积压和毛利率是核心变量。
business.thesisEn: The NVIDIA linkage comes from AI server shipments and enterprise AI projects, with GPU supply, backlog, and margin as core variables.
riskNotes: AI 服务器收入可能伴随较低毛利率和营运资本压力。 / AI server revenue can carry lower margins and working-capital pressure.
PC 周期、企业 IT 支出和 GPU 供应都会影响组合。 / PC cycles, enterprise IT spending, and GPU supply affect the mix.

supplyChain.thesis: NVIDIA 相关性来自 AI 服务器出货和企业 AI 项目，GPU 供应、订单积压和毛利率是核心变量。 / The NVIDIA linkage comes from AI server shipments and enterprise AI projects, with GPU supply, backlog, and margin as core variables.
supplyChain.thesisZh: NVIDIA 相关性来自 AI 服务器出货和企业 AI 项目，GPU 供应、订单积压和毛利率是核心变量。
supplyChain.thesisEn: The NVIDIA linkage comes from AI server shipments and enterprise AI projects, with GPU supply, backlog, and margin as core variables.

companies: Data-center power and cooling suppliers / 数据中心电力与散热供应商

entities.name: NVIDIA Corporation / 英伟达
entities.relationship: 供应 GPU、网络和软件平台，是该公司 AI 服务器或 GPU 云服务的重要上游。
entities.relationshipZh: 供应 GPU、网络和软件平台，是该公司 AI 服务器或 GPU 云服务的重要上游。
entities.relationshipEn: Supplies GPUs, networking, and software platforms that are important upstream inputs for the company's AI servers or GPU cloud services.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

entities.name: Enterprise and AI customers / 企业与 AI 客户
entities.relationship: 购买 AI 服务器、GPU 云或加速计算服务，将 NVIDIA GPU 能力转化为训练、推理和企业应用。
entities.relationshipZh: 购买 AI 服务器、GPU 云或加速计算服务，将 NVIDIA GPU 能力转化为训练、推理和企业应用。
entities.relationshipEn: Buy AI servers, GPU cloud, or accelerated-computing services, converting NVIDIA GPU capacity into training, inference, and enterprise applications.

relationshipStrength.label: 弱相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 终端客户代表需求去向，但通常不直接决定上游产能瓶颈。

relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: End customers indicate demand direction but usually do not directly determine upstream capacity bottlenecks.
